description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a rounded toe and a classic lace-up design. The upper appears to be made of smooth synthetic or leather material, with subtle stitching details and a slightly padded collar for comfort. The shoe features a thick, flat rubber sole that extends slightly up the toe and heel, providing durability and grip. Decorative side panels and perforations are visible, adding both style and breathability. The color scheme is predominantly white with faint blue-gray accents along the seams and sole edges. The overall design is casual and versatile, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A white low-top sneaker with blue-gray accents, lace-up closure, and a thick flat sole. Features subtle stitching, side panels, and a padded collar.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, laces, and tongue, highlighting the shoe's symmetry and lace-up closure.
description_view_1: Left side view displays the side panel, stitching details, and the full length of the sole.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the heel tab, back stitching, and branding area on the heel.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the side panel, perforations, and the sole's profile.
